libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Ensure the generated/updated test setup applies nativeTest runtime system properties for 5.0.1 as well as 5.0.0: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. Keep tests self-contained by starting a local Vert.x HTTP server on localhost instead of calling external HTTP services.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: OAuth2WebClient is documented as a feature and vertx-auth-oauth2 is an optional artifact dependency; avoid OAuth2 coverage unless intentionally adding that optional dependency.
External HTTP endpoints or real OAuth/Keycloak services would make tests flaky and are not required for baseline WebClient, multipart, caching, session, redirect, and JSON coverage.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency or Docker service is needed for meaningful Vert.x Web Client coverage; it can be exercised against an in-process Vert.x HTTP server. However, vertx-web-client 5.0.1 resolves Vert.x Core 5.0.1 and Netty 4.2.2.Final, which needs explicit JVM system properties for Java 25 native-image runtime tests.
